global_rules: Do not reintroduce player carry/return logic.

weapons.owners: fire/elite enemy, Forge Mauler, Ember Scarab
weapons.impactOnPlayer: medium AoE impact, ember burst, small knockback/screen shake only for boss version
weapons.notes: Use this sprite from assets/enemies/weapons/sprites/. If black remnants appear, render additively or refine alpha cutoff.

cryo_warden.behavior: Rixnei Cryo Shard Lance eu8eia pros ton player. Fortizei ice beam me telegraph grammh. Se low HP mporei na petaksei 1-2 frost chakrams.
cryo_warden.impact: Medium frost damage, icy burst, optional slow mono an yparxei hdh slow system. Beam kanei continuous damage mono meta apo warning.

forge_mauler.behavior: Plhsiazei arga kai varia. Rixnei Magma Reaver Lance san molten shot kai Void Ember Comet se arc/meteor path.
forge_mauler.impact: Heavy fire damage, ember burst, small screen shake sta heavy hits. Warning circle prin apo comet AoE.

null_hierophant.behavior: Anoigei sigil kyklous, kanei beam meta apo telegraph kai stelnei slow rupture orb pros ton player.
null_hierophant.impact: Continuous beam damage meta apo warning, rupture orb me warning ring kai heavy AoE explosion. No invisible radius.

pale_bloodknight.behavior: Kynhgaei epithetika, kanei telegraphed scythe arc konta kai stelnei dark blade waves.
pale_bloodknight.impact: Heavy slash damage, red/purple blade impact, optional knockback mono an yparxei. Small rupture AoE as phase attack.

rail_reaper.behavior: Paizei san sniper. Deixnei lepth warning line prin apo fast needle/rail shot. Den spamarei.
rail_reaper.impact: High damage fast projectile me mikro hitbox kai warning line. Toxic spear kanei green glitch burst; no poison unless existing system.

reactor_colossus.behavior: Fortizei chest core, rixnei Arc Circuit Beam kai overheat Magma Reaver Lance.
reactor_colossus.impact: Beam tick damage after telegraph, heavy projectile impact, reactor pulse with clear warning.

solar_tyrant.behavior: Petai golden bolts, chargearei piercing javelin kai se elite phase xrhsimopoiei Eden Star Lance.
solar_tyrant.impact: Medium readable golden shots, high damage piercing javelin with telegraph, rare heavy star impact.

abyss_maw.impact: Small rupture orb AoE kai bite-wave cone damage.

amethyst_fang.impact: Fast small/medium projectile hits. Small hitbox, readable trail.

cryo_claw.impact: Light/medium frost shard damage; slow only if existing system.

ember_scarab.impact: Light fire shots, small ember impact, no screen clutter.

pulse_burrower.impact: Short electric pulse with small circle telegraph; light/medium shock damage.

rift_eye.impact: Mini beam tick damage or small rupture AoE.

solar_stinger.impact: Fast golden shots, small javelin, light/medium damage.

toxin_leech.impact: Medium green glitch splash. No core/resource drain.

void_widow.impact: Telegraphed scythe slash medium damage and fast needle if ranged.

volt_rat.impact: Tiny zap/electric bolt, light shock damage; stun only if existing system.
